caption: A high-angle, wide shot captures a large, circular assembly hall filled with hundreds of people seated in tiered, fan-shaped rows. The attendees are primarily dressed in white traditional Indian attire, with some wearing colorful sashes or stoles. The seating is arranged in several wedge-shaped sections separated by green carpeted aisles that converge toward a central point at the bottom of the frame. In the background, elevated galleries with ornate gold railings overlook the main floor. The scene remains static across the frames, with the camera position fixed and the assembly members remaining seated and attentive. The architecture is characterized by a symmetrical, radial design with neutral-toned walls and repetitive seating arrangements, creating a formal and organized atmosphere within the grand hall.
